meta.title: Event Survey
meta.subtitle: Tell us how the last Bonfire event felt and help shape the next one.

eventsSurveyPage.subtitle: We’d love to hear what clicked, what didn’t, and what you’d love to see more of next time.

summary.setup: Pick the event and give us the vibe check
summary.highlights: Tell us what landed and what you want more of
summary.future: Tell us what would bring you back

setup.title: Set the scene
setup.description: Choose the event first, then give us the quick overall read on how the night felt.

highlights.title: What really landed?
highlights.description: Tell us what people showed up for, what felt strongest, and what deserves more space next time.

talks.title: How did the talks feel?
talks.description: Give us the broad read on pacing and format. If you want to go deeper, there’s a talk-by-talk section right below.

talkFeedback.title: Go talk by talk
talkFeedback.description: If you want to get more specific, this is where you can rate individual talks and leave a quick note.

future.title: What should happen next?
future.description: Wrap up with whether you’d come again and anything we should tweak, try, or rethink.

form.title: Feedback Survey
form.subtitle: Tell us what you enjoyed, what missed the mark, and what would make the next one even better.
form.successMessage: Thanks for taking a minute. We’ll use this to keep making Bonfire better.
form.draftNote: Drafts stay in your browser until you hit submit. If you leave without sending, nothing gets saved on our side.
form.suggestionsPlaceholder: Anything you’d love us to improve, change, or try next time?
form.talkCommentPlaceholder: Anything about this talk you’d love us to keep, improve, or do differently?

questions.event: Which event are you thinking about?
questions.overallRating: How did the event feel overall?
questions.favoriteParts: What part of the event did you enjoy most?
questions.futureTopics: What would you love to see more of at future Bonfires?
questions.talkFormat: How did the talk length and format feel?
questions.talkFeedbackExpandedHint: Give quick scores to any talks that stood out and leave notes if you want.
questions.talkFeedbackSummary: {count, plural, =0 {No talks rated yet} one {# of {total} talks rated} other {# of {total} talks rated}}
questions.talksOverallRating: How did the talk lineup feel overall?
questions.talkRating: How did this talk land for you?
questions.nextEventLikelihood: How likely are you to come to the next one?
questions.suggestions: Anything else you want to tell us?

options.talks_could_go_deeper: Talks could go deeper / be longer

errors.atLeastOneAnswer: Please choose an event and answer at least one question before sending this in.
errors.invalidTalkFeedback: A few talk responses could not be matched to the selected event.
errors.otherRequired: Please fill in the custom option you selected.
errors.otherTooLong: Please keep that extra note under 500 characters.
errors.talkCommentTooLong: Please keep each talk note under 1000 characters.
errors.suggestionsTooLong: Please keep your final note under 5000 characters.
errors.rateLimited: You’ve sent too many responses. Please try again later.
errors.botBlocked: We couldn’t verify this request. Please try again.
errors.csrfInvalid: Please refresh the page and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
